title: The Coast of Folly
writer: Coningsby William Dawson, James Ashmore Creelman, Forrest Halsey
actors: Gloria Swanson, Anthony Jowitt, Alec B. Francis
plot: Unable to abide her self-righteous husband, Nadine Gathway leaves home and drops out of sight for 20 years. When Mr. Gathway dies, he leaves his huge fortune to his daughter, Joyce, on the condition that she never become involved ...
